vision_profile.current_state: Aditya is a 25-year-old Software Engineer in Bengaluru with 2 years of experience, proficient in Python, FastAPI, and MongoDB. He earns 68000/month and is eager to transition into AI.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest fear is missing the AI hiring wave due to a lack of strong, production-ready AI portfolio projects to demonstrate his capabilities in LLM application design, RAG architecture, and AI response evaluation.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Aditya will be a skilled AI Application Engineer, confidently building and deploying AI-powered applications using LLM APIs, vector databases, and RAG pipelines. He will have a robust portfolio, securing a role with a target salary of 150000/month.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated by the excitement of AI tools and a strong desire to move beyond tutorials to build real, impactful AI applications that solve practical problems.

milestones.identity_statement: Lay a robust foundation in LLM concepts and API integration to kickstart your journey into AI application development.

modules.title: Core LLM Concepts & Prompt Engineering
modules.description: Understand the fundamentals of Large Language Models and master the art of crafting effective prompts for various applications.

skills.description: Learn about different LLM architectures (e.g., Transformers), their capabilities, limitations, and key terminology.

skills.description: Master techniques like few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, and self-consistency to guide LLMs for better outputs.

scenario.title: Design a Multi-Turn Conversational Prompt

milestones.identity_statement: Master the art of integrating external knowledge into LLMs using vector databases and RAG pipelines to build context-aware applications.

modules.title: Vector Embeddings & Similarity Search
